headline: QUALCOMM (QCOM) Unveils Snapdragon Reality Elite For On Device AI And Spatial Computing
summary: QUALCOMM, ticker NasdaqGS:QCOM, has introduced its Snapdragon Reality Elite platform focused on on-device AI and spatial computing. The platform targets mixed reality and spatial computing devices, with hardware tuned for next-generation immersive experiences. This launch broadens QUALCOMM's reach beyond smartphones toward a wider set of AI and connectivity use cases. QUALCOMM is known for its wireless chipsets and connectivity solutions, and the Snapdragon Reality Elite platform extends...
